title: sedum obtusifolium var. listoniae
intro: Sedum obtusifolium var. listoniae, also known as Liston's stonecrop, is a type of succulent plant in the sedum family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of sedum obtusifolium var. listoniae include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
